verses.text: Topa aw, nang kong bel hi. Kei hong zahhuaisak kei in
Na thumanna tawh kei hong huh in la, hong honkhia in. Keima lamah na bil hong ngat in la, hong hon in
Hong hon dingin ka belh suangpi, ka kulh muan'huai, hong hi ta in; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah hong honpa leh ka belhpa na hi hi
Ka Pasian aw, migilote' khutsung pan leh thumanlo mite leh migilote' matna panin keimah hong hon in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian aw, ka neu lai-a kipanin ka hong lamet, ka hong muan' na hi hi, Topa aw
Ka suah tunga kipanin nangmah kong bel a, ka nu' gilsung panin hong lakhiapa na hi hi. Nangmah ka hong phat ngitnget hi
Mi tampite-a' dingin a siahil bang ka hih hangin nang pen a muan'huai, keima belh na hi hi
Sunthapai-in nangmah ka hong phat a, na minthan'na ka gen tawntung hi
Ka teek hun ciangin kei hong lawnkhia kei in la, ka tha a kiat ciangin kei hong nusia kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka galte kihoho-in, keimah hong thahnopna thu kikumkum uh hi
“Pasian in amah nusiazo a, amah a hon ding kuamah omlo ahih manin, amah delhin man ni,” kici uh hi
Pasian aw, kei kiang panin gamla om kei in. Ka Pasian aw, keimah a huh dingin hong manlang in
Kei hong mawhsakte zahhuai-in beimang uh hen la, keima siatna ding a zongte simmawhna leh minsiatna in tuamcip ta hen
Ahih hangin ke'n, nang kong lamen ding a, nangmah kong phat semsem lai ding hi
Thuman tawh na hotkhiatna na nasepnate simzawh lohin tam ahih manin sunthapai-in ka gengen ding hi
Topa Pasian aw, na nasep liante ka phat ding a, na thumanna bek genin ka nei ding hi
Pasian aw, ka khangno lai-a kipanin nong thuhilh a, a lamdang na nasepnate ka gengen lai hi
Tua ahih ciangin Pasian aw, hong piang lai ding mite khempeuh tungah nangma hatna thu ka gen khit matengin, teekin ka sam a kang zongin kei hong nusia kei in
Pasian aw, na vangliatna leh na thumanna in van sangpite banto hi. Pasian aw, na lianpipi na sem khinzo hi. Nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam
Gimna lianpipi a hong tuaksak nangmah in kei nong hingkiksak ding a, lei thukpi sung panin nong lakhiato ding hi
Nangmah in ka min hoihna nong khangsak ding a, nong hehnem kik ding hi
Ka Pasian aw, na thumannate hangin kei zong harp lasakna tawh nangmah kong phat ding hi. Israel-te' Siangtho Pa aw, laia lasakna tawh nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi
Nangmah phatna ka sak ciangin nuamin ka awng ding a, na hong hotkhiatna hangin ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nuamin ka awng ding hi
Keima siatna ding a zongte kizahhuaisak khin a, minsia khinzo ahih manun thuman tawh na hong huhna sunthapai-in ka gengen ding hi.
